variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 18161 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 18161 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 18161 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 173.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 164.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 135.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 412.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 405.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P534544 Air Filter, Safety Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18161
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P534544 Air Filter, Safety Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18161
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P534544 Air Filter, Safety Radialseal features a durable radialseal design that provides a secure, leak-resistant fit while delivering high-efficiency filtration. It captures fine dust and debris, ensuring clean airflow and protecting engine components from premature wear. Ideal for demanding environments, this safety air filter adds an extra layer of protection in conjunction with a primary filter. Its radialseal construction allows for easy installation and removal without sacrificing sealing performance.
